children.heading: Election for grant in lieu of contract
children.label: b Election for grant in lieu of contract

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Contractors for activities to which this chapter applies who have entered into a contract under the Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act [ et seq.] that is in effect on , may, by giving notice to the Secretary, elect to have the provisions of this chapter apply to such activity in lieu of such contract.25 U.S.C. 5301January 8, 2002

children.heading: Effective date of election
children.label: 2 Effective date of election
children.text: Any election made under paragraph (1) shall take effect on the first day of July immediately following the date of such election.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: 3 Exception
children.text: In any case in which the first day of July immediately following the date of an election under paragraph (1) is less than 60 days after such election, such election shall not take effect until the first day of July of year following the year in which the election is made.6So in original. Probably should be followed by “the”.6

children.heading: No duplication
children.label: c No duplication
children.text: No funds may be provided under any contract entered into under the Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act [ et seq.] to pay any expenses incurred in providing any program or services if a grant has been made under this chapter to pay such expenses.25 U.S.C. 5301

children.label: A
children.text: a Bureau school with assistance under this chapter shall be entitled to the transfer or use of buildings, equipment, supplies, and materials to the same extent as if it were contracting under the Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act [ et seq.]; or25 U.S.C. 5301

children.label: B
children.text: a contract school with assistance under this chapter shall be entitled to the transfer or use of buildings, equipment, supplies, and materials that were used in the operation of the contract school to the same extent as if it were contracting under the Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act.

children.heading: Funds
children.label: 2 Funds
children.text: Any tribe or tribal organization which assumes operation of a Bureau school with assistance under this chapter and any tribe or tribal organization which elects to operate a school with assistance under this chapter rather that to continue as a contract school shall be entitled to any funds which would carryover from the previous fiscal year as if such school were operated as a contract school.7So in original. Probably should be “than”.7

children.heading: Funding for school improvement
children.label: 3 Funding for school improvement
children.text: Any tribe or tribal organization that assumes operation of a Bureau school or a contract school with assistance under this chapter shall be eligible for funding for the improvement, alteration, replacement, and repair of facilities to the same extent as a Bureau school.

children.heading: Exceptions, problems, and disputes
children.label: e Exceptions, problems, and disputes
children.text: Any exception or problem cited in an audit conducted pursuant to , any dispute regarding a grant authorized to be made pursuant to this chapter or any amendment to such grant, and any dispute involving an administrative cost grant under shall be administered under the provisions governing such exceptions, problems, or disputes in the case of contracts under the Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act [ et seq.]. The Equal Access to Justice Act shall apply to administrative appeals filed after , by grantees regarding a grant under this chapter, including an administrative cost grant.section 2505(b)(1) of this titlesection 2008 of this title25 U.S.C. 5301September 8, 1988
